## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Risk

- [ ] `low`
- [ ] `medium`
- [ ] `high`

## Plan

- [ ] Non-trivial work had an execution plan in `docs/exec-plans/active/`
- Plan link or note:

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e:smoke` if required by risk/profile
- Additional notes:

## Runtime Evidence

- Routes or flows covered:
- Artifact path, screenshot, or report link if relevant:

## Guardrails

- [ ] Architecture boundaries still hold
- [ ] No speculative refactor mixed into the requested work
- [ ] Repeated failure patterns were promoted into docs, lint, scripts, or scaffolding when needed
